name: Gobhir Joler Maach
overview: These four women appear to be the picture of true friendship but underneath lie secrets and scandals - infidelity, deception, blackmail, and even murder.

trailers.title: Trailer - Gobhir Joler Maach (গভীর জলের মাছ) | Swastika, Ushasi, Ananya, Trina | 10th Feb | hoichoi
